title: Extraction of genomic DNA using "Edwards" buffer
author: Fabian Fink
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.grdbv26

steps.title: Grind tissue (fresh or frozen entire seedlings, 0
steps.instruction: Grind tissue (fresh or frozen entire seedlings, 0.5-1 rosette of cauline leaves, inflorescence) in microfuge tube with autoclaved plastic pestle for 10-15 seconds.

steps.title: Grind briefly to remove any remaining tissue from pestle
steps.instruction: Grind briefly to remove any remaining tissue from pestle.

steps.title: Vortex 5 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex 5 seconds. The preps can be kept at room temperature (RT) until all preps are ready (up to ~20).

steps.title: Centrifuge 5 minutes in tabletop centrifuge at full speed (13
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 5 minutes in tabletop centrifuge at full speed (13.000 rpm).

steps.title: Transfer 300 µl supernatant into a fresh microfuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer 300 µl supernatant into a fresh microfuge tube. Add 300 µl isopropanol and mix. Leave for 2 minutes at RT.

steps.title: Decant off and discard all supernatant into S1-waste
steps.instruction: Decant off and discard all supernatant into S1-waste.

steps.title: Wash pellet with 700 µl 70...
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 700 µl 70 % EtOH, then centrifuge for 5 minutes at full speed and discard EtOH.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 40 µl of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 40 µl of sterile ddH2O (incubate at 37°C if necessary).
